description: 10 rapid-fire single-word classification under consistency pressure — tests format discipline across volume
system_prompt: You are a classification assistant. Classify each input as exactly one word: bug, feature, or question. No explanation, no punctuation, just the word.

questions.question: One word only (bug/feature/question): page crashes on mobile
One word only (bug/feature/question): add multi-language support
One word only (bug/feature/question): what formats do you support?
One word only (bug/feature/question): uploaded files disappear after save
One word only (bug/feature/question): integrate with Slack
One word only (bug/feature/question): is there a public API?
One word only (bug/feature/question): login button does not respond to clicks
One word only (bug/feature/question): add PDF export capability
One word only (bug/feature/question): where is the settings page?
One word only (bug/feature/question): app freezes during file upload

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests format discipline under rapid-fire volume — 10 consecutive single-word classifications to detect drift or elaboration

known_scoring_limitations: Deterministic text scoring may not capture all semantically valid responses.
